About Me

My Journey & Expertise

Who I Am

I am a designer-developer hybrid who loves bridging the gap between elegant UI visual design and powerful, production-grade backend logic. I enjoy solving complex engineering challenges and creating smooth animations that delight users.

Over the years, I've worked with client companies, startups, and open-source contributors to deliver web applications that don't just work flawlessly under the hood, but also present a premium, polished user interface.

Download Resume

Tech Stack

HTML5 & CSS3 / Modern Layouts 95%
React / Next.js 90%
JavaScript / TypeScript 92%
Tailwind CSS & SCSS 88%
Node.js / Express 88%
Python / FastAPI 80%
SQL / PostgreSQL 85%
RESTful APIs / GraphQL 90%
Figma (UI/UX & Prototyping) 85%
Git / GitHub Workflows 92%
Docker & Cloud (AWS / Vercel) 78%
Linux System Administration 75%

My Timeline

2024 - Present

Lead Full Stack Engineer

Apex Tech Labs

Architected responsive web platforms, engineered microservices, and mentored junior devs while transitioning core infrastructure to Next.js.

2022 - 2024

Web Developer & UI Designer

Nova Digital Studio

Created gorgeous user interfaces in Figma and developed interactive client websites using React and node.js, improving conversions by 40%.

2019 - 2022

B.S. in Computer Science

Tech Institute of Science

Graduated with honors, focusing on software engineering principles, algorithms, database systems, and human-computer interaction designs.

What I Offer

My Technical Services

Frontend Architecture

Designing modern, responsive, and performance-optimized frontends. Using cutting-edge structures to deliver blazing-fast page loads and pixel-perfect UIs.

Robust Backend & APIs

Constructing scalable backend infrastructure, reliable server architectures, and clean database integrations. Focus on security and quick API responses.

UI/UX Prototyping

Wireframing, sketching, and building full-scale functional prototypes in Figma. Establishing intuitive and satisfying user journeys and modern typography hierarchies.

AI & Automation Integrations

Integrating large language models, building automated workflows, and implementing smart agents into existing business systems for automated productivity.
